creator: hamiltcl@verizon.net
text:
(In reply to Gustavo Romero from comment #12)
Understood! My initial efforts back in 2016 were to provide the patches directly to openjdk.java.net. I may have even exchanged emails with you about including my patched in the ppc-aix-port back then. However, it was recommended that I provide my patches to the downstream bsd-port. So I worked with Greg to get the initial jdk8 patches committed. 

Greg and the maintainers of the bsd-port should decide whether to upstream the bsd-port (patches) to openjdk.java.net. These patches alone are incomplete.

Hope this helps.
